tasks.label: Java: build & run
args: javac -Xlint:all Main.java && { timeout 10 java -ea Main < inputf.in > outputf.in; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 124 ] && echo "[TIMEOUT 10s: program khatam nahi hua - infinite loop?]" >&2; exit $rc; }
tasks.detail: javac + java (-ea assertions on). Exceptions/stack-traces khud terminal (stderr) pe aate hain. inputf.in -> outputf.in via redirect.
